name: ModificationStamp
summary: The ModificationStamp class provides the modification stamp for the objects of the model that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

constructors.name: ModificationStamp
constructors.summary: Creates a new modification stamp instance where the current modification stamp is 0. Can be used for fetching all the created or deleted model objects from the model history.

constructors.name: ModificationStamp
constructors.summary: Creates a new modification stamp instance with the given local and server stamps. Can be used for fetching from the model history all the model objects that have been created or deleted after the specified stamp.

properties.name: LocalStamp
properties.summary: The modification stamp for the local changes.

properties.name: ServerStamp
properties.summary: The modification stamp from the multi-user server for the external changes caused by the saving of the multi-user model.
